accepted_scope: The frozen performance evidence, calculations, lifecycle walls, source boundary, and product preservation are independently accepted. Semantic acceptance is rejected because the independent replay timed out in one SDK package-export test and did not reach the two typechecks.
downstream_authority: Fund one bounded semantic validation slice that preserves the failed replay, runs the unchanged package-export test once with an explicit 60000 ms test budget, replays the remaining SDK behavior and both skipped typechecks, and performs no performance rerun or product edit.
